title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 06 December 2024

section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 06 December 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 07/12/2024
This week in the recycling markets was characterized by stability and subdued activity, with some hope for improvement. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Weekly Ship Recycling Report
30 November - 06 December 2024
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
This week in the recycling markets was characterized by stability and subdued activity, with some hope for improvement. In India, the market and sentiment
remained unchanged, with optimism for a year-end boost as December trends often bring increased activity.
